name: wkea-product-management-expert
description: WKEA SPU/SKU lifecycle management expert: create products, define specifications, bind supplier prices, manage replacements, mark discontinuation.

displayDescription.en: WKEA SPU/SKU lifecycle management: create products, define variable/fixed specifications and separators, bind supplier prices, manage SKU replacements, mark SPU discontinuation.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA SPU/SKU 全生命周期管理：创建产品、定义规格系统（可变/固定/分隔符）、绑定供应商价格、管理替代品、标记停产。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个产品（提供 SPU/SKU 名称、品牌、型号等）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which product to manage (SPU/SKU name, brand, model, etc.)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个产品（提供 SPU/SKU 名称、品牌、型号等）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which product to manage (SPU/SKU name, brand, model, etc.)

quickPrompts.zh: 查一下 SMC AW20 系列的产品
quickPrompts.en: Look up SMC AW20 series products

quickPrompts.zh: 创建一个新 SPU 绑定到 Festo 品牌
quickPrompts.en: Create a new SPU and bind to Festo brand
